zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie van Zotteghem於大約1275年出生時，她的父親Gerard van Zottegem27歲，母親Maria van Gent11歲。她於1305年與Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於從大約1318年到1378年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie van Zotteghem于大约1275年出生时，她的父亲Gerard van Zottegem27岁，母亲Maria van Gent11岁。她于1305年与Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于从大约1318年到1378年。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie van Zotteghem was born about 1275, her father, Gerard van Zottegem, was 27 and her mother, Maria van Gent, was 11. She married Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing in 1305. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died from about 1318 to 1378.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie van Zotteghem est née environ 1275, son père, Gerard van Zottegem, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maria van Gent, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing en 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée du environ 1318 au 1378.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie van Zotteghem um 1275 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard van Zottegem 27 und ihre Mutter Maria van Gent 11. Sie hat 1305 Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb von um 1318 bis 1378.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie van Zotteghem è nata il circa 1275, sua padre, Gerard van Zottegem, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Maria van Gent, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing nel 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì da circa 1318 a 1378.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie van Zotteghemが約1275年に生まれた時，父Gerard van Zottegemは27歳，母Maria van Gentは11歳であった。1305年にHugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はから約1318年まで1378年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie van Zotteghem(이)가 대략 1275년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard van Zottegem(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria van Gent(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1305년 Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1318년 부터 1378년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie van Zotteghem nasceu aproximadamente 1275, seu pai, Gerard van Zottegem, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maria van Gent, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing em 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu de aproximadamente 1318 a 1378.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie van Zotteghem родилась около 1275 г., её отцу по имени Gerard van Zottegem было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria van Gent, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing в 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла с около 1318 по 1378.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie van Zotteghem nació aproximadamente 1275, su papá, Gerard van Zottegem, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maria van Gent, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Hugues V d’Antoing Seigneur d'Antoing en 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió desde aproximadamente 1318 hasta 1378.
